message:
fix: rename verbose to extended in list-priors and update test fields

Minor cleanups to align with naming conventions and add missing fields:

1. CLI list-priors command:
   - Renamed --verbose/-v to --extended (no short flag)
   - Avoids conflict with common global verbose flags
   - Updated comments to match new parameter name

2. decision_real.rs test:
   - Added missing ProcessCandidate fields:
     - process_state: None
     - wchan: None
     - critical_files: Vec::new()
   - Aligns test fixture with updated struct definition

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
